text.message: blue can we make a deal for the sheep port
i don't have  alot of good options here
like I can trade you one of my starting materials to get to the sheep port
thinking of plowing but I don
Bad deal for you orange lol
I could get plowed by blue
I was thinking something different actually
so the deal is 3 port service in exchange for letting blue on the sheep port
We don't have to explain our deal to red
I'm talking to oj, not you
He didn’t even do what i thought he was talking about
also red, If i give you the 6 of wheat can I have a wood trade?
Shall I interfere with you trade deal?
Huh that was not what i was thinking orange
you get plowed by blue here
now black is a free range hen
I mean blue probably wins here either way
Black has a good shot too
Everyone has a good shot, unless they don't know how to play
I came back to a 10 foot long chat log
I'm going to solo you all game.
Will probably cost you the game
I mean you can idk where else I was going to block it
I did by far my best move
To not do what i did would have been stupid and self-destructive
What does more sheep and wood het you?
it's only fair if fairness was a thing in this world
Nice when there is evidence of cheating in the chat lol
I didn't plow him, he pointed there to plow me
There’s never an excuse for griefing
How, it doesn't her you more numbers, other than an 11
And doesn't get you more resources
I mean it's a wheatless world out there
wait there isn't even wheat lol
You just wanted to plow, and when one failed, you did another
You probably could have won if you didn’t decide to go weirdo scorched earth
for the sake of the game man I wouldn't be petty
we here to have fun after all
lol its cheating you are gonna get yourself kicked off
I didn't call anyone a child or insult anyone
It’s why griefing is reportable, so it makes the game fair
it's not it's just messed up
You get kicked off the game for this kind of behavior
How come I'm still in the game?
black what do you think about today's political discourse
What's not healthy is the desperate plowing
How is it your best move when it doesn't  get you new resources or numbers
What extra number did it get you?
You’ll probably get kicked off the game for it
I mean from the game entirely blue
Blue what do you need for orange plow
I'm still in the game entirely
They review it after the game
why don't you work with red
If yall behave you can win
anyways time to block blue for the entire game
Nothing wrong with a mid game plow
I'm glad everyone is having fun
it's a nice change of pace
it'd be a shame if you traded me the win
